note: Linkit configures autocomplete linking via linkit_profile config entities plus pluggable Matcher and Substitution plugins. All cases are `recipe` (response-graded); none mutate site state.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site using Linkit, what config entity type holds the ordered list of autocomplete matchers, and at which admin path do I list and add these? Name the entity type and the route/path.
evals.expected_output: The linkit_profile config entity (linkit.linkit_profile.*), managed at /admin/config/content/linkit (route entity.linkit_profile.collection).

evals.prompt: I want to add a brand-new autocomplete source to Linkit for a custom entity type in my Drupal 11 module. What plugin type do I implement, and in which plugin namespace does the class live?
evals.expected_output: Implement a Matcher plugin in the Plugin/Linkit/Matcher namespace (extend MatcherBase / implement MatcherInterface, #[Matcher(...)] attribute), managed by MatcherManager.

evals.prompt: How do I turn on Linkit autocomplete inside CKEditor 5 for a specific text format on a Drupal 11 site? Describe which plugin/filter to enable and any ordering requirement.
evals.expected_output: On the text format, enable the Drupal link (drupallink) plugin and toggle Linkit on with a profile (editor.settings.plugins.drupallink.linkit_enabled / linkit_profile), then enable the Linkit filter, which must run before Limit allowed HTML.

evals.prompt: In Linkit, which plugin type decides what URL an entity reference resolves to (e.g. entity canonical page vs direct file download), and what namespace do such plugins use? Also name the bundled ones.
evals.expected_output: A Substitution plugin (Plugin/Linkit/Substitution namespace, SubstitutionInterface, #[Substitution(...)]). Bundled: Canonical (default), File, Media.

evals.prompt: Instead of a raw path, what does Linkit insert into the link when an editor picks an entity suggestion, and if 'Limit allowed HTML' is enabled which attributes must I add to the <a> tag so it survives filtering?
evals.expected_output: Linkit inserts an entity: reference like entity:node/1 plus data-entity-* attributes; add data-entity-type and data-entity-uuid (and title for automatic titles) to the allowed <a> tag.

evals.prompt: Which Drupal permission gates access to create, edit, and delete Linkit profiles and manage their matchers?
evals.expected_output: The 'administer linkit profiles' permission, which guards every profile/matcher route.

evals.prompt: In a Drupal 11 module, which alter hooks let me modify Linkit's matcher and substitution plugin definitions (for example to remove the user matcher)? Name them.
